hero.title: Modern Productivity Without Enterprise Complexity
hero.subtitle: Kanban boards, recurring tasks, smart reminders, inbox capture, and reports — all in a clean, fast app built for individuals and small teams.

features.heading: Everything you need, nothing you don't

kanban.title: Kanban Board
kanban.description: Visualize your workflow with drag-and-drop columns. Move tasks between Todo, In Progress, and Done.

recurring.title: Recurring Tasks
recurring.description: Daily standups, weekly reviews, monthly reports — set the schedule once and tasks appear automatically. Configure lead time to prepare ahead.

reminders.title: Smart Reminders
reminders.description: Get notified about overdue and upcoming tasks with priority-based alerts.

ordering.title: Persistent Ordering
ordering.description: Your board order is saved automatically. Drag once, stay organized forever.

inbox.title: Inbox Capture
inbox.description: Quickly capture ideas and tasks. Review, convert, or discard from a dedicated inbox.

reports.title: Weekly & Monthly Reports
reports.description: Track your productivity with automatic summaries of completed work.

roadmap.heading: What's next
roadmap.subheading: We're actively building. This is where TaskOps is heading.

items.title: Advanced recurrences
items.description: More flexible recurring tasks with series editing, skipped occurrences and better control over future tasks.

items.title: Lightweight daily planning
items.description: A Today view to prioritize the day, review overdue tasks and plan without turning TaskOps into a heavy calendar.

items.title: Quick capture and optional AI
items.description: Improvements to create tasks faster, detect simple dates and add intelligent help only when it provides value.

feedback.heading: Help shape TaskOps
feedback.description: Found a bug, missing feature or UX improvement? Share your feedback and help decide what comes next.

message.label: Your feedback
message.placeholder: Describe what you found or what you'd like to see...

toast.error: Could not send feedback. Please try again.
